theory.hypothesis: Reina can handle a more adaptive spelling session when Sunny keeps the academic target fixed but varies the experience around speed, visual, low-writing-load, confidence, typing, challenge, control.
evidenceSummary: Strong spelling evidence supports a rotated 10-word challenge.
theory.intervention: Use spell-check and equivalent valid activities as interventions while preserving spelling evidence quality.
supportCriteria: at least 5 targets when the activity is target-based
delayed or graded work does not contradict the in-app result
reviseCriteria: child asks to change activity or shows repeated hesitation
stated preference conflicts with observed behavior
falsifyCriteria: returned test shows the practiced target did not transfer

plannedMeasurements.reviseCriteria: partial accuracy, hesitation, or mixed engagement
plannedMeasurements.falsifyCriteria: poor transfer, high frustration, or repeated misses
